submitted_payload.suggested_entry: - Ralph Workflow — free and open-source workflow layer for autonomous coding that composes planning, implementation, and verification into a reviewable repo-native flow.

why_this_action: Shared artifacts still show distribution_and_message_to_primary_repo_conversion as the live bottleneck, Codeberg adoption is flat, Apollo is already in a measurement window until 2026-05-30, Reddit remains structurally blocked, and 0xWelt/Awesome-Vibe-Coding was the strongest still-unsent prepared curator target with active maintainer signals. Public commit metadata exposed a legitimate contact email, so direct curator outreach was the highest-leverage same-run write path available without GitHub auth.
shared_findings_used: adoption_metrics_latest.json: Codeberg remains flat and is still the primary success gate
market_intelligence_latest.json: reuse canonical positioning and Codeberg-primary CTA
curator_contact_discovery_latest.json: LinkedIn was known, but public Git commit metadata unlocked a stronger direct email path
drafts/curator_outreach/2026-05-22/02_7-0xwelt-awesome-vibe-coding.md: reused the prepared entry and positioning instead of inventing a new lane

measurement_window.success_signal: reply, PR invitation, listing inclusion, or a new qualified backlink path that sends evaluators to the Codeberg primary repo
measurement_window.kill_condition: If no reply or listing signal arrives by 2026-06-06, replace this lane with a different untouched curator surface instead of re-sending the same pitch.

verification.contact_verification: GitHub commits by author 0xWelt exposed dinghao12601@gmail.com in public commit metadata on 2026-05-06 and earlier commits.

repairs_applied.change: Updated 0xWelt/Awesome-Vibe-Coding from prepared to sent_via_email_fallback so the queue reflects real execution and future runs do not duplicate this outreach.
Added the maintainer's public Git commit email as a verified contact path and marked the target sent.
Appended the outreach record so future distribution runs can dedupe against this live contact.
